description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the image registry.gitlab.com/continuousevolution/continuous-evolution/build and runs a before_script that copies the project to /go/src/continuous-evolution and changes into that directory. Define stages vendor, lint, test, build, tag, and doc. In the vendor stage add a vendor job that runs `make vendor` then `cp -R vendor $CI_PROJECT_DIR` and stores the vendor directory as a one‑week artifact. In the lint stage add fmt and mocks jobs (both depend on vendor) that run `make lint` and `make mocks && echo "if this step fail, you should regenerate mocks (make mocks) before commit again" && git diff --exit-code` respectively. In the test stage add a coverage job that configures git user, runs `make cover`, and a unit job that configures git user, installs go‑junit‑report with `go get -u github.com/jstemmer/go-junit-report`, runs `make test-verbose 2>&1 | go-junit-report > report.xml`, copies the report and publishes it as a JUnit artifact; both use the docker:dind service with DOCKER_HOST set to tcp://docker:2375. In the build stage add a binary job (`make && ./build/cli -version`), a binary‑tag job (only on master, same commands plus `cp -R build $CI_PROJECT_DIR` and a one‑week artifact), a docker job (docker:dind service, `make && docker build -t $CI_JOB_ID -f Dockerfile . && docker run $CI_JOB_ID -version`), and a docker‑tag job (only on master, docker:dind, `make && docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY && docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE -f Dockerfile . && docker run $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE -version && docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE`). In the tag stage add binary and docker jobs that run only on tags: binary runs `make && cp -R build $CI_PROJECT_DIR` with a build artifact, docker logs in, builds `docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} -f Dockerfile .` and pushes it, also using docker:dind. Finally, in the doc stage add a pages job that runs only on master, executes `make doc && cp -R public $CI_PROJECT_DIR`, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
